languages.text: {n}Лария смотрит в пол, пытаясь скрыть выступившие слезы.{/n} "Я не отказываюсь от своих слов и не стану препятствовать леди Ювенне. Когда настанет время, вы поймете {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}истинную причину{/d} моих поступков, Ваша Све..." {n}Она осекается на полуслове и все же поднимает покрасневшие глаза на Себериана.{/n} "Ты поймешь, отец".

traits.locale_text: Лария говорит нечто загадочное, что когда Себериан узнает истиную причину ее поступка, он все поймет и простит

languages.text: {n}Laria looks down at the floor, trying to hide the tears that have escaped.{/n} "I do not renounce my words and I will not stand in the way of Lady Juvenna. When the time comes, you will understand {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}the true reason{/d} for my actions, Your Lord-" {n}She falters on the word and determinedly raises her reddened eyes to Seberian.{/n} "You will understand, Father."
languages.original_text: {n}Лария смотрит в пол, пытаясь скрыть выступившие слезы.{/n} "Я не отказываюсь от своих слов и не стану препятствовать леди Ювенне. Когда настанет время, вы поймете {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}истинную причину{/d} моих поступков, Ваша Све..." {n}Она осекается на полуслове и все же поднимает покрасневшие глаза на Себериана.{/n} "Ты поймешь, отец".

When the time comes, you will understand the true reason for my actions, Your Lord-" {n}She falters on the word and determinedly raises her reddened eyes to Seberian.{/n} "You will understand, Father."

languages.text: {n}菈丽雅低头看向地面，试图掩饰已然滑落的泪水。{/n}“我不会收回我的话，我也不会阻挡尤文娜女士。当时机到来时，您会明白我{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}如此行事的真正原因{/d}，大——”{n}她在称呼上迟疑了一瞬，随后抬起泛红的双眼，直视塞贝里安。{/n}“您会明白的……父亲。”
languages.original_text: {n}Laria looks down at the floor, trying to hide the tears that have escaped.{/n} "I do not renounce my words and I will not stand in the way of Lady Juvenna. When the time comes, you will understand {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}the true reason{/d} for my actions, Your Lord-" {n}She falters on the word and determinedly raises her reddened eyes to Seberian.{/n} "You will understand, Father."

traits.locale_text: {n}菈丽雅低头看向地面，试图掩饰已然滑落的泪水。{/n}“我不会收回我的话，我也不会阻挡尤文娜女士。当时机到来时，您会明白我{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}如此行事的真正原因{/d}，大——”{n}她在称呼上迟疑了一瞬，随后抬起泛红的双眼，直视塞贝里安。{/n}“您会明白的……父亲。”

languages.text: {n}Laria baisse les yeux vers ses pieds, cherchant à dissimuler les larmes qui lui échappent.{/n} « Je ne renie pas mes paroles et je ne m'opposerai pas à dame Juvenna. Le moment venu, vous comprendrez {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}la véritable raison{/d} de mes actions, Votre Seigneu... » {n}Elle ne parvient pas à finir le mot et lève ses yeux rougis vers Seberian.{/n} « Vous comprendrez, père. »
languages.original_text: {n}Laria looks down at the floor, trying to hide the tears that have escaped.{/n} "I do not renounce my words and I will not stand in the way of Lady Juvenna. When the time comes, you will understand {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}the true reason{/d} for my actions, Your Lord-" {n}She falters on the word and determinedly raises her reddened eyes to Seberian.{/n} "You will understand, Father."

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria baisse les yeux vers ses pieds, cherchant à dissimuler les larmes qui lui échappent.{/n} « Je ne renie pas mes paroles et je ne m'opposerai pas à dame Juvenna. Le moment venu, vous comprendrez {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}la véritable raison{/d} de mes actions, Votre Seigneu... » {n}Elle ne parvient pas à finir le mot et lève ses yeux rougis vers Seberian.{/n} « Vous comprendrez, père. »

languages.text: {n}Laria mira al suelo, intentando ocultar sus lágrimas.{/n} «No renuncio a mis palabras, ni me interpondré en el camino de lady Juvenna. Cuando llegue el momento, entenderá las {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}verdaderas razones{/d} de mis actos, mi...». {n}Incapaz de terminar la palabra, levanta sus ojos enrojecidos en dirección a Seberian.{/n} «Lo entenderá, padre».
languages.original_text: {n}Laria looks down at the floor, trying to hide the tears that have escaped.{/n} "I do not renounce my words and I will not stand in the way of Lady Juvenna. When the time comes, you will understand {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}the true reason{/d} for my actions, Your Lord-" {n}She falters on the word and determinedly raises her reddened eyes to Seberian.{/n} "You will understand, Father."

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria mira al suelo, intentando ocultar sus lágrimas.{/n} «No renuncio a mis palabras, ni me interpondré en el camino de lady Juvenna. Cuando llegue el momento, entenderá las {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}verdaderas razones{/d} de mis actos, mi...». {n}Incapaz de terminar la palabra, levanta sus ojos enrojecidos en dirección a Seberian.{/n} «Lo entenderá, padre».

languages.text: {n}Laria, dökülen gözyaşlarını gizlemeye çalışarak yere bakıyor.{/n} "Sözlerimden vazgeçmiyorum. Leydi Juvenna'nın yoluna çıkmayacağım. Zamanı geldiğinde eylemlerimin {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}gerçek nedenini{/d} anlayacaksınız Lord H..." {n}Duraksıyor ve kızarmış gözlerini kararlılıkla Seberian'a çeviriyor.{/n} "Anlayacaksın baba."
languages.original_text: {n}Laria looks down at the floor, trying to hide the tears that have escaped.{/n} "I do not renounce my words and I will not stand in the way of Lady Juvenna. When the time comes, you will understand {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}the true reason{/d} for my actions, Your Lord-" {n}She falters on the word and determinedly raises her reddened eyes to Seberian.{/n} "You will understand, Father."

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria, dökülen gözyaşlarını gizlemeye çalışarak yere bakıyor.{/n} "Sözlerimden vazgeçmiyorum. Leydi Juvenna'nın yoluna çıkmayacağım. Zamanı geldiğinde eylemlerimin {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}gerçek nedenini{/d} anlayacaksınız Lord H..." {n}Duraksıyor ve kızarmış gözlerini kararlılıkla Seberian'a çeviriyor.{/n} "Anlayacaksın baba."

languages.text: {n}Laria blickt zu Boden und versucht, ihre Tränen zu verbergen.{/n} "Ich stehe zu meinen Worten und werde Lady Juvenna nicht im Weg stehen. Zu gegebener Zeit werdet Ihr den {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}wahren Grund{/d} für mein Verhalten verstehen, Eure Lord..." {n}Sie stockt bei diesem Wort und richtet ihre geröteten Augen entschlossen auf Seberian.{/n} "Ihr werdet es verstehen, Vater."
languages.original_text: {n}Laria looks down at the floor, trying to hide the tears that have escaped.{/n} "I do not renounce my words and I will not stand in the way of Lady Juvenna. When the time comes, you will understand {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}the true reason{/d} for my actions, Your Lord-" {n}She falters on the word and determinedly raises her reddened eyes to Seberian.{/n} "You will understand, Father."

traits.locale_text: {n}Laria blickt zu Boden und versucht, ihre Tränen zu verbergen.{/n} "Ich stehe zu meinen Worten und werde Lady Juvenna nicht im Weg stehen. Zu gegebener Zeit werdet Ihr den {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}wahren Grund{/d} für mein Verhalten verstehen, Eure Lord..." {n}Sie stockt bei diesem Wort und richtet ihre geröteten Augen entschlossen auf Seberian.{/n} "Ihr werdet es verstehen, Vater."

languages.text: {n}ラリアは顔を伏せ、こぼれ落ちた涙を隠そうとする。{/n}「私の言葉は撤回せず、ジュベナ卿の道に立ちはだかるつもりはありません。時が来れば、{d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}私の行動の真の理由{/d}を理解してくれるでしょう、我が主様。」{n}彼女は言葉を詰まらせ、紅潮した目をセベリアンに向ける。{/n}「理解してくれるでしょう、父様。」
languages.original_text: {n}Laria looks down at the floor, trying to hide the tears that have escaped.{/n} "I do not renounce my words and I will not stand in the way of Lady Juvenna. When the time comes, you will understand {d|Encyclopedia:Ch4_DL_LariaTraitor}the true reason{/d} for my actions, Your Lord-" {n}She falters on the word and determinedly raises her reddened eyes to Seberian.{/n} "You will understand, Father."
